are also other methods this will be fairly simple
method.
 Tarot cards are the easiest method.
Check whether the cards are ready for reading.
Pull out a card if you get swords or wands rains, it is
less rains, for major card rains are medium if u get cups
or pentacles rains are good.
 Next is the method is to check when the sun enters in
the mithuna rasi.see whether the moon is placed in
watery sign and many planets in watery sign then there
will copious rains.
In 2002 there was a drought. If u see, when the sun entered
it was in the lagna of the kataka but many planets in the
12th house and only two planets were in the watery sign. it
was India’s worst drought after many years.
 See the tithi yoga and naksahrta, which will give
additional idea to predict.
venus is before mars this is considered neagtive mars has
to be before venus in this ingress
 Using celestial signs
Like that of rainbows, mock suns, lizards, flower trees
animals etc.
